asset.title: Research Upsert
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates the GTM research sheet's import and upsert capabilities, showing how duplicate accounts are updated rather than duplicated.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly shows the import of a new account and the subsequent update of an existing account to demonstrate the upsert feature.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire flow: initial state, adding a new row, and updating an existing row with modified data.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with clear visual hierarchy, though some input fields are slightly cramped.

consistency.evidence: Matches the NodeRoom theme of GTM research sheets, room traces, and agent-driven workflows.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live working prototype with real-time UI updates and state changes.

legibility.evidence: The text in the import text area is small but readable at full resolution.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly relevant to GTM and sales operations teams managing account lists.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the upsert behavior without masking the manual copy-paste input step.

observedEvidence: Room trace logging the import actions

defects.observed: The text pasted into the import text area is quite small and hard to read on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Increase the font size of the placeholder and input text in the import modal.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom's GTM research sheet handles imports: adding new accounts and automatically updating existing ones without creating duplicates.
